questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司計劃將應用程式遷移到 AWS 雲端。在系統審核期間，該公司發現其內容管理系統（CMS）應用程式與雲端環境不相容。哪些遷移策略將幫助公司以最少的努力遷移 CMS 應用程式？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate applications to the AWS Cloud. During a system audit, the company finds that its content management system (CMS) application is incompatible with cloud environments. Which migration strategies will help the company to migrate the CMS application with the LEAST effort? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 退休
A.en: Retire

B.zh: 重新主持
B.en: Rehost

C.zh: 回購
C.en: Repurchase

D.zh: 平臺重構
D.en: Replatform

A.zh: 錯誤。指停止使用某些應用程式或服務。如果 CMS 應用程式對業務至關重要，則直接停用並不合適，因此此選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. refers to stopping the use of certain applications or services. If the CMS application is business critical, direct retirement is not appropriate and therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。（「Lift and Shift」）是將應用程式直接遷移到雲端環境，無需對其進行任何修改。這種方法通常是最簡單、最省力的遷移策略之一，因此這個選項也是如此。
B.en: Correct. ("Lift and Shift") is the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to it. This approach is generally one of the simplest, least effort migration strategies, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。是指用雲端現成的解決方案取代現有應用程序，例如購買SaaS服務。這種方法避免了複雜的兼容性問題，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. refers to replacing existing applications with ready-made solutions in the cloud, such as purchasing SaaS services. This approach avoids complex compatibility issues, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。ing 是指對應用程式進行輕微修改以使其適應雲端環境。此方法需要一些開發工作，因此不符合「最小工作量」要求。這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. ing refers to making slight modifications to an application to adapt it to a cloud environment. This method requires some development effort and therefore does not meet the "minimum effort" requirement. This option is.

E.zh: 錯誤。是指對應用程式進行重大修改或重新設計以適應雲端環境。這種方法通常是最複雜和耗時的，因此它不滿足「最少努力」的要求，並且是一個不正確的選擇。
E.en: Incorrect. refers to the significant modification or redesign of an application to adapt to the cloud environment. This method is usually the most complex and time-consuming, so it does not meet the "least effort" requirement and is an incorrect option.

answer_text.zh: B. 重新主持；C. 回購

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BC (34%)； CD (26%)； AC (23%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：（「Lift and Shift」）是將應用程式直接遷移到雲端環境，無需對其進行任何修改。這種方法通常是最簡單、最省力的遷移策略之一，因此這個選項也是如此。；是指用雲端現成的解決方案取代現有應用程序，例如購買SaaS服務。這種方法避免了複雜的兼容性問題，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (34%); CD (26%); AC (23%). Popular discussion and key point summary: ("Lift and Shift") is the direct migration of an application to a cloud environment without any modifications to it. This approach is generally one of the simplest, least effort migration strategies, so this option is.; refers to replacing existing applications with ready-made solutions in the cloud, such as purchasing SaaS services. This approach avoids complex compatibility issues, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 下列哪些是關於使用 AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) 的 AWS 最佳實務建議？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are AWS best practice recommendations for the use of AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS 帳戶根使用者進行日常存取。
A.en: Use the AWS account root user for daily access.

B.zh: 在 Amazon EC2 上使用存取金鑰和秘密存取金鑰。
B.en: Use access keys and secret access keys on Amazon EC2.

C.zh: 定期輪換憑證。
C.en: Rotate credentials on a regular basis.

D.zh: 為系統管理員建立一組共用存取金鑰。
D.en: Create a shared set of access keys for system administrators.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS 最佳實務建議避免使用 root 使用者進行日常操作，因為 root 使用者擁有過多的權限，可能會導致安全風險。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS best practices recommend avoiding using the root user for daily operations because the root user has excessive privileges and may lead to security risks.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS 建議使用 IAM 角色，而不是直接在 EC2 執行個體上使用存取金鑰和秘密存取金鑰，以避免金鑰洩漏的風險。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS recommends using IAM roles instead of using access keys and secret access keys directly on EC2 instances to avoid the risk of key exposure.

C.zh: 正確。定期輪替憑證是 AWS 安全最佳實踐，可以降低憑證暴露的風險。
C.en: Correct. Regularly rotating credentials is an AWS security best practice and can reduce the risk of credential exposure.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 建議為每個使用者建立單獨的 IAM 使用者和憑證，而不是共用存取金鑰，這樣可以更好地追蹤和管理權限。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS recommends creating separate IAM users and credentials for each user rather than sharing access keys, which allows for better tracking and management of permissions.

E.zh: 正確。設定 MFA 是 AWS 安全最佳實踐，可為您的帳戶提供額外的保護層。
E.en: Correct. Configuring MFA is an AWS security best practice and can provide an additional layer of protection for your account.

answer_text.zh: C. 定期輪換憑證。；E. 設定多重身份驗證 (MFA)。
answer_text.en: C. Rotate credentials on a regular basis.; E. Configure multi-factor authentication (MFA).

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：CE (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：定期輪替憑證是 AWS 安全最佳實踐，可以降低憑證暴露的風險。；設定 MFA 是 AWS 安全最佳實踐，可為您的帳戶提供額外的保護層。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CE (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Regularly rotating credentials is an AWS security best practice and can reduce the risk of credential exposure.; Configuring MFA is an AWS security best practice and can provide an additional layer of protection for your account.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: AWS 在 AWS 責任共擔模型下負責哪個選項？
question_text.en: Which option is AWS responsible for under the AWS shared responsibility model?

A.zh: 網路與防火牆配置
A.en: Network and firewall configuration

B.zh: 用戶端資料加密
B.en: Client-side data encryption

C.zh: 使用者權限管理
C.en: Management of user permissions

D.zh: 硬體與基礎設施
D.en: Hardware and infrastructure

A.zh: 錯誤。網路和防禦牆配置是客戶的責任，因為客戶需要根據自己的需求配置安全群組和網路ACL等資源。
A.en: Incorrect. Network and defense wall configuration is the responsibility of the customer, because customers need to configure resources such as security groups and network ACLs according to their own needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。客戶端資料加密是客戶的責任，因為客戶需要保證客戶端的資料加密和解密操作。
B.en: Incorrect. Client data encryption is the responsibility of the customer, as the customer needs to ensure data encryption and decryption operations on the client side.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：使用者權限管理是客戶的責任，因為客戶需要透過 IAM（身分和存取管理）來管理使用者權限。
C.en: Incorrect. User rights management is the responsibility of the customer, as customers need to manage user rights through IAM (Identity and Access Management).

D.zh: 正確。AWS負責管理底層硬體和基礎設施，包括資料中心管理安全、硬體維護等。
D.en: Correct. AWS is responsible for managing the underlying hardware and infrastructure, including data center management security, hardware maintenance, etc.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS負責管理底層硬體和基礎設施，包括資料中心管理安全、硬體維護等。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS is responsible for managing the underlying hardware and infrastructure, including data center management security, hardware maintenance, etc.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要執行一個圖形查詢來提供信用卡使用者的姓名、地址和交易。該公司希望該圖表能夠顯示姓名、地址和交易是否表明可能存在詐欺行為。哪種 AWS 資料庫服務可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to run a graph query that provides credit card users’ names, addresses, and transactions. The company wants the graph to show if the names, addresses, and transactions indicates possible fraud. Which AWS database service will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon DocumentDB（與 MongoDB 相容）
A.en: Amazon DocumentDB (with MongoDB compatibility)

B.zh: 亞馬遜時間流
B.en: Amazon Timestream

C.zh: 亞馬遜 DynamoDB
C.en: Amazon DynamoDB

D.zh: 亞馬遜海王星
D.en: Amazon Neptune

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DocumentDB 是一個文件資料庫，主要用於儲存和查詢 JSON 格式的文件資料。它不適合處理圖查詢或關係複雜的圖數據，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. Amazon DocumentDB is a document database primarily used to store and query document data in JSON format. It is not suitable for processing graph queries or graph data with complex relationships, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一個時間序列資料庫，旨在處理時間序列數據，例如物聯網數據或應用程式效能監控數據。它不適合處理圖查詢，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a time series database designed to process time series data, such as IoT data or application performance monitoring data. It is not suitable for processing graph queries, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一個鍵值和文件資料庫，適合處理高效能NoSQL數據，但不支援圖查詢或複雜關係資料的處理，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. is a key-value and document database suitable for processing high-performance NoSQL data, but does not support graph queries or the processing of complex relational data, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。是專門為支援圖查詢和複雜關係資料處理而設計的圖資料庫服務。它非常適合處理涉及圖結構的場景，例如社交網路分析或詐欺偵測。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a graph database service specifically designed to support graph queries and the processing of complex relational data. It is ideal for handling scenarios involving graph structures, such as social network analysis or fraud detection. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是專門為支援圖查詢和複雜關係資料處理而設計的圖資料庫服務。它非常適合處理涉及圖結構的場景，例如社交網路分析或詐欺偵測。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a graph database service specifically designed to support graph queries and the processing of complex relational data. It is ideal for handling scenarios involving graph structures, such as social network analysis or fraud detection. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務提供機器學習功能來偵測和分析影像和影片中的內容？
question_text.en: Which AWS service provides machine learning capability to detect and analyze content in images and videos?

A.zh: 亞馬遜連接
A.en: Amazon Connect

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Lightsail
B.en: Amazon Lightsail

C.zh: 亞馬遜個人化
C.en: Amazon Personalize

D.zh: 亞馬遜 Rekognition
D.en: Amazon Rekognition

A.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Connect 是一項雲端聯絡中心服務，用於客戶支援和呼叫中心管理，無論影像和視訊內容的機器學習分析如何。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Connect is a cloud contact center service for customer support and call center management, regardless of machine learning analysis of image and video content.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Lightsail 是一種簡單的雲端運算服務，主要用於虛擬伺服器、儲存和網路功能，與機器學習或影像和視訊分析無關。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Lightsail is a simple cloud computing service that is primarily used for virtual servers, storage, and network functions and has nothing to do with machine learning or image and video analysis.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Personalize 是一項機器學習服務，用於建立獨立於影像和視訊內容分析的個人化推薦系統。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Personalize is a machine learning service for building personalized recommendation systems, independent of image and video content analysis.

D.zh: 正確。Amazon Rekognition 是一項機器學習服務，旨在偵測和分析影像和視訊內容，例如臉部辨識、物件偵測等。
D.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon Rekognition is a machine learning service designed to detect and analyze image and video content, such as facial recognition, object detection, and more.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Rekognition 是一項機器學習服務，旨在偵測和分析影像和視訊內容，例如臉部辨識、物件偵測等。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Rekognition is a machine learning service designed to detect and analyze image and video content, such as facial recognition, object detection, and more.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望其 AWS 使用能更永續。該公司希望追蹤、測量、審查和預測其 AWS 應用程式產生的汙染排放。公司可以使用哪些 AWS 服務或工具來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants its AWS usage to be more sustainable. The company wants to track, measure, review, and forecast polluting emissions that result from its AWS applications. Which AWS service or tool can the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 運作狀況儀錶板
A.en: AWS Health Dashboard

B.zh: AWS 客戶碳足跡工具
B.en: AWS customer carbon footprint tool

C.zh: AWS 支援中心
C.en: AWS Support Center

D.zh: 亞馬遜 QuickSight
D.en: Amazon QuickSight

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Health Dashboard 主要用於提供有關 AWS 服務運行狀態的即時信息，並幫助用戶了解服務中斷或事件的影響。它與碳排放追蹤無關。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Health Dashboard is mainly used to provide real-time information about the operating status of AWS services and help users understand the impact of service interruptions or events. It has nothing to do with carbon emission tracking.

B.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS 客戶碳足跡工具旨在協助客戶追蹤、測量和預測其 AWS 使用過程中的碳排放，是解決此問題的正確工具。
B.en: Correct. The AWS customer carbon footprint tool, designed to help customers track, measure, and predict the carbon emissions from their AWS usage, is the right tool to solve this problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS 支援中心是一個用於管理支援案例和服務請求的支援門戶，與碳排放追蹤無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Support Center is a support portal for managing support cases and service requests and has nothing to do with carbon emissions tracking.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon QuickSight 是一項用於資料視覺化和分析的商業智慧服務。雖然它可以用來開發數據，但它不提供碳排放追蹤功能。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon QuickSight is a business intelligence service used for data visualization and analysis. Although it can be used to develop data, it does not provide carbon emission tracking functionality.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS 客戶碳足跡工具
answer_text.en: B. AWS customer carbon footprint tool

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS 客戶碳足跡工具旨在協助客戶追蹤、測量和預測其 AWS 使用過程中的碳排放，是解決此問題的正確工具。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The AWS customer carbon footprint tool, designed to help customers track, measure, and predict the carbon emissions from their AWS usage, is the right tool to solve this problem.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務使用戶能夠部署高度可重複的基礎架構配置？
question_text.en: Which AWS service gives users the ability to deploy highly repeatable infrastructure configurations?

A.zh: AWS CloudFormation
A.en: AWS CloudFormation

B.zh: AWS CodeDeploy
B.en: AWS CodeDeploy

C.zh: AWS CodeBuild
C.en: AWS CodeBuild

D.zh: AWS 系統管理器
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：AWS CloudFormation 是一項支援基礎架構即程式碼的服務，可讓使用者透過範本定義和部署可重複的基礎架構配置。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is an infrastructure-as-code-enabled service that allows users to define and deploy repeatable infrastructure configurations through templates.

B.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CodeDeploy 是一項自動化部署服務，主要用於部署應用程式程式碼，而不是管理基礎架構配置。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CodeDeploy is an automated deployment service primarily used for the deployment of application code rather than the management of infrastructure configurations.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS CodeBuild 是一項持續整合服務，用於建置和測試程式碼，而不是部署基礎架構配置。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS CodeBuild is a continuous integration service used for building and testing code rather than deploying infrastructure configurations.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 是一項管理和營運服務，為資源提供操作和監控功能，但並不專注於部署可重複的基礎設施配置。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Systems Manager is a management and operations service that provides operations and monitoring capabilities for resources, but is not focused on deploying repeatable infrastructure configurations.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：AWS CloudFormation 是一項支援基礎架構即程式碼的服務，可讓使用者透過範本定義和部署可重複的基礎架構配置。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: AWS CloudFormation is an infrastructure-as-code-enabled service that allows users to define and deploy repeatable infrastructure configurations through templates.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要使用語音通話和網路聊天功能提供客戶服務。公司應該使用哪種 AWS 服務來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs to provide customer service by using voice calls and web chat features. Which AWS service should the company use to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜極光
A.en: Amazon Aurora

B.zh: 亞馬遜連接
B.en: Amazon Connect

C.zh: Amazon WorkSpaces
C.en: Amazon WorkSpaces

D.zh: AWS 組織
D.en: AWS Organizations

A.zh: 錯誤。是一個關聯式資料庫服務，主要是為了高效能資料庫管理而設計的，與客服語音通話和網路聊天功能無關，所以這個選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. is a relational database service designed primarily for high-performance database management and is not related to customer service voice calling and web chat capabilities, so this option is.

B.zh: 正確。是一項雲端聯絡中心服務，專門用於支援語音通話和網路聊天功能，非常適合客戶服務場景，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. is a cloud contact center service specifically designed to support voice calling and web chat capabilities, making it ideal for customer service scenarios, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一項虛擬檢查服務，提供安全的雲端檢查環境，並且與客戶服務語音通話和網路聊天功能無關，因此此選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. is a virtual inspection service that provides a secure cloud inspection environment and is not associated with customer service voice calling and web chat capabilities, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一項帳戶管理服務，用於集中管理多個 AWS 帳戶，與客服的語音通話和網頁聊天功能無關，因此此選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is an account management service used to centrally manage multiple AWS accounts and has nothing to do with the voice calling and web chat features of customer service, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項雲端聯絡中心服務，專門用於支援語音通話和網路聊天功能，非常適合客戶服務場景，所以這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a cloud contact center service specifically designed to support voice calling and web chat capabilities, making it ideal for customer service scenarios, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 服務旨在協助使用者在資料倉儲環境中處理大量資料？
question_text.en: Which AWS service is designed to help users handle large amounts of data in a data warehouse environment?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 RDS
A.en: Amazon RDS

B.zh: 亞馬遜 DynamoDB
B.en: Amazon DynamoDB

C.zh: 亞馬遜紅移
C.en: Amazon Redshift

D.zh: 亞馬遜極光
D.en: Amazon Aurora

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種託管關聯式資料庫服務，適合運行傳統關係型資料庫（例如MySQL、PostgreSQL、SQL Server等）。它不是專門為處理資料倉儲環境中的大規模資料而設計的，因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a managed relational database service suitable for running traditional relational databases (such as MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, etc.). It is not specifically designed to handle large-scale data in a data warehouse environment, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種 NoSQL 資料庫服務，旨在處理高吞吐量和低延遲的鍵值或文件儲存場景。它不適合資料倉儲環境，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a NoSQL database service designed to handle high-throughput and low-latency key-value or document storage scenarios. It is not suitable for a data warehouse environment, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。是專門為資料倉儲設計的服務，能夠處理大規模資料分析任務。它支援複雜的查詢和分析，非常適合資料倉儲環境。因此這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a service designed specifically for data warehousing and capable of handling large-scale data analysis tasks. It supports complex queries and analysis and is ideal for data warehouse environments. Therefore this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一款適用於事務處理和傳統資料庫應用場景的高效能關聯式資料庫服務。它不是專門為在資料倉儲環境中使用而設計的，因此此選項是專為在資料倉儲環境中使用而設計的。
D.en: Incorrect. is a high-performance relational database service suitable for transaction processing and traditional database application scenarios. It is not specifically designed for use in a data warehouse environment, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是專門為資料倉儲設計的服務，能夠處理大規模資料分析任務。它支援複雜的查詢和分析，非常適合資料倉儲環境。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service designed specifically for data warehousing and capable of handling large-scale data analysis tasks. It supports complex queries and analysis and is ideal for data warehouse environments. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 AWS 建立 Web 應用程式。哪種 AWS 服務將有助於防止針對 Web 應用程式的網路層 DDoS 攻擊？
question_text.en: A company is building a web application using AWS. Which AWS service will help prevent network layer DDoS attacks against the web application?

A.zh: AWS WAF
A.en: AWS WAF

B.zh: AWS 防火牆管理器
B.en: AWS Firewall Manager

C.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS 盾
D.en: AWS Shield

A.zh: 錯誤。（網頁應用防火牆）主要用於保護應用程式免受常見的Web攻擊（例如SQL注入和跨站腳本攻擊），而不是專門針對網路層DDoS攻擊。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. (Web Application Firewall) is mainly used to protect applications from common web attacks (such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks), rather than specifically targeting network layer DDoS attacks. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一個集中管理工具，用於管理跨多個帳戶的防火牆規則和策略。它本身並不直接防禦 DDoS 攻擊，而是幫助管理其他安全服務（例如 AWS WAF 和 AWS Shield）。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a centralized management tool for managing firewall rules and policies across multiple accounts. It does not directly defend against DDoS attacks itself, but helps manage other security services (such as AWS WAF and AWS Shield). Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。是一種威脅偵測服務，用於識別潛在的惡意活動和異常行為，但它不能直接防範網路層 DDoS 攻擊。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. is a threat detection service used to identify potentially malicious activities and anomalous behaviors, but it does not directly protect against network layer DDoS attacks. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。是專門為防禦DDoS攻擊而設計的服務，分為標準版和高級版。可以有效防禦網路層和應用層的DDoS攻擊。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a service specially designed to defend against DDoS attacks and is divided into standard and premium editions. It can effectively defend against DDoS attacks at the network layer and application layer. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是專門為防禦DDoS攻擊而設計的服務，分為標準版和高級版。可以有效防禦網路層和應用層的DDoS攻擊。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service specially designed to defend against DDoS attacks and is divided into standard and premium editions. It can effectively defend against DDoS attacks at the network layer and application layer. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 遷移到 AWS 雲端有下列哪些優點？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: Which of the following are advantages of moving to the AWS Cloud? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用者可以在幾秒鐘內實施所有 AWS 服務。
A.en: Users can implement all AWS services in seconds.

B.zh: AWS 承擔基礎架構和應用程式安全的所有責任。
B.en: AWS assumes all responsibility for the security of infrastructure and applications.

C.zh: 使用者體驗到更快的速度和敏捷性。
C.en: Users experience increased speed and agility.

D.zh: 使用者受益於大規模的規模經濟。
D.en: Users benefit from massive economies of scale.

E.zh: 使用者可以將硬體從資料中心移動到 AWS 雲端。
E.en: Users can move hardware from their data center to the AWS Cloud.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然AWS提供了快速部署服務的能力，但並非所有服務都可以在幾秒鐘內實施。例如，一些複雜的服務需要配置和部署時間。
A.en: Incorrect. While AWS provides the ability to deploy services quickly, not all services can be implemented in seconds. For example, some complex services require configuration and time to deploy.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS採用共享責任模型，其中AWS負責基礎設施的安全，而使用者負責應用程式和資料的安全。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS adopts a shared responsibility model, where AWS is responsible for the security of the infrastructure, while users are responsible for the security of applications and data.

C.zh: 正確。透過遷移到 AWS，使用者可以快速配置資源並縮短實驗和部署週期，從而提高速度和敏捷性。
C.en: Correct. By migrating to AWS, users can quickly provision resources and shorten experimentation and deployment cycles, improving speed and agility.

D.zh: 正確。AWS透過大規模營運降低成本，使用者可以享受經濟效益。
D.en: Correct. AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations, and users can enjoy economic benefits.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS雲端是基於虛擬化的服務，使用者無法直接將實體硬體遷移到雲端。
E.en: Incorrect. The AWS cloud is a virtualization-based service, and users cannot directly migrate physical hardware to the cloud.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用者體驗到更快的速度和敏捷性。；D. 使用者受益於大規模的規模經濟。
answer_text.en: C. Users experience increased speed and agility.; D. Users benefit from massive economies of scale.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：CD (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：透過遷移到 AWS，使用者可以快速配置資源並縮短實驗和部署週期，從而提高速度和敏捷性。；AWS透過大規模營運降低成本，使用者可以享受經濟效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: By migrating to AWS, users can quickly provision resources and shorten experimentation and deployment cycles, improving speed and agility.; AWS reduces costs through large-scale operations, and users can enjoy economic benefits.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 運算服務使用戶能夠安全可靠地大規模運行容器？
question_text.en: Which AWS compute service gives users the ability to securely and reliably run containers at scale?

A.zh: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
A.en: Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

B.zh: 亞馬遜極光
B.en: Amazon Aurora

C.zh: 亞馬遜雅典娜
C.en: Amazon Athena

D.zh: 亞馬遜 Polly
D.en: Amazon Polly

A.zh: 正確。Amazon ECS 是 AWS 提供的容器編排服務，旨在安全可靠地運行容器化應用程序，並支援大規模運行容器。
A.en: Correct. Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service provided by AWS that is designed to run containerized applications securely and reliably, and supports running containers at scale.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Aurora 是一種關聯式資料庫服務，與執行容器無關。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Aurora is a relational database service that has nothing to do with running containers.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Athena 是一項互動式查詢服務，用於分析 Amazon S3 中儲存的數據，獨立於容器運行。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Athena is an interactive query service for analyzing data stored in Amazon S3, independent of container runs.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Polly 是一種與容器無關的文字轉語音服務。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Polly is a text-to-speech service that is container-agnostic.

answer_text.zh: A. Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)
answer_text.en: A. Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon ECS 是 AWS 提供的容器編排服務，旨在安全可靠地運行容器化應用程序，並支援大規模運行容器。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon ECS is a container orchestration service provided by AWS that is designed to run containerized applications securely and reliably, and supports running containers at scale.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪一種 AWS 工具或功能可作為子網路層級的 VPC 防火牆？
question_text.en: Which AWS tool or feature acts as a VPC firewall at the subnet level?

A.zh: 安全群組
A.en: Security group

B.zh: 網路 ACL
B.en: Network ACL

C.zh: 流量鏡像
C.en: Traffic Mirroring

D.zh: 網際網路網關
D.en: Internet gateway

A.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：安全群組是控制進出 EC2 執行個體的流量的執行個體級防火牆，而不是子網路層級防火牆。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Security groups are instance-level firewalls that control traffic to and from EC2 instances, rather than subnet-level firewalls.

B.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：網路 ACL（網路存取控制清單）是子網路層級防火牆，用於控制進出子網路的流量。它可以設定允許和拒絕規則並且是無狀態的。
B.en: Correct. A Network ACL (Network Access Control List) is a subnet-level firewall that controls traffic in and out of a subnet. It can set allow and deny rules and is stateless.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：流量鏡像是一種用於擷取和分析網路流量的工具，而不是防火牆功能。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Traffic Mirroring is a tool used to capture and analyze network traffic, not a firewall feature.

D.zh: 錯誤。Internet 閘道是允許 VPC 與 Internet 通訊的元件，不具防火牆功能。
D.en: Incorrect. An Internet gateway is a component that allows a VPC to communicate with the Internet and does not have firewall functionality.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：網路 ACL（網路存取控制清單）是子網路層級防火牆，用於控制進出子網路的流量。它可以設定允許和拒絕規則並且是無狀態的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: A Network ACL (Network Access Control List) is a subnet-level firewall that controls traffic in and out of a subnet. It can set allow and deny rules and is stateless.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上執行一個執行批次作業的應用程式。該應用程式是容錯的並且可以處理中斷。該公司希望優化運行該應用程式的成本。哪種 AWS 產品可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs an application on AWS that performs batch jobs. The application is fault-tolerant and can handle interruptions. The company wants to optimize the cost to run the application. Which AWS offering will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 Macie
A.en: Amazon Macie

B.zh: 亞馬遜海王星
B.en: Amazon Neptune

C.zh: Amazon EC2 Spot 執行個體
C.en: Amazon EC2 Spot Instances

D.zh: Amazon EC2 隨選執行個體
D.en: Amazon EC2 On-Demand Instances

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種資料安全服務，用於識別和保護敏感資料。它與運行批次作業的應用程式無關，因此該選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is a data security service used to identify and protect sensitive data. It has nothing to do with the application running the batch job, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種用於建立圖形資料模型的託管圖形資料庫服務。它與運行批次作業的應用程式無關，因此該選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. is a managed graph database service for building graph data models. It has nothing to do with the application running the batch job, so this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。Spot 執行個體是 EC2 的定價模型，允許使用者以較低的價格使用未使用的運算能力。非常適合容錯且能夠處理中斷的應用程序，例如批次作業。這個選項是正確的，因為它既滿足成本最佳化需求，也滿足容錯應用。
C.en: Correct. Spot Instances is a pricing model of EC2 that allows users to use unused computing capacity at a lower price. Ideal for applications that are fault tolerant and able to handle interruptions, such as batch jobs. This option is correct because it meets both cost optimization needs and fault-tolerant applications.

D.zh: 錯誤。按需實例是 EC2 的一種定價模型，即用即付，無需長期承諾。雖然它適合運行應用程序，但價格較高，並不是成本優化的最佳選擇。這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. On-Demand Instances is a pricing model of EC2 that pays as you go without long-term commitment. Although it is suitable for running applications, it is more expensive and is not the best choice for cost optimization. This option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. Amazon EC2 Spot 執行個體

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Spot 執行個體是 EC2 的定價模型，允許使用者以較低的價格使用未使用的運算能力。非常適合容錯且能夠處理中斷的應用程序，例如批次作業。這個選項是正確的，因為它既滿足成本最佳化需求，也滿足容錯應用。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Spot Instances is a pricing model of EC2 that allows users to use unused computing capacity at a lower price. Ideal for applications that are fault tolerant and able to handle interruptions, such as batch jobs. This option is correct because it meets both cost optimization needs and fault-tolerant applications.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪個 AWS 服務可用於在呼叫特定 Amazon CloudWatch 警報時傳送警報？
question_text.en: Which AWS service can be used to send alerts when a specific Amazon CloudWatch alarm is invoked?

A.zh: AWS CloudTrail
A.en: AWS CloudTrail

B.zh: Amazon 簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)
B.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

C.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)

D.zh: 亞馬遜 EventBridge
D.en: Amazon EventBridge

A.zh: 錯誤。主要用於記錄API呼叫和使用者活動。它無法直接發送通知或警報，因此此選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is mainly used to record API calls and user activity. It cannot send notifications or alerts directly, so this option is wrong.

B.zh: 正確。Amazon SNS 是一種通知傳送服務，可以透過電子郵件、簡訊等方式發送通知。它與 Amazon CloudWatch 整合良好，可以在觸發 CloudWatch 警報時發送通知。因此這個選項是。
B.en: Correct. Amazon SNS is a notification delivery service that can send notifications via email, SMS, etc. It integrates well with Amazon CloudWatch and can send notifications when CloudWatch alarms are triggered. Therefore this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon SQS 是一種訊息佇列服務，主要用於訊息的解耦和非同步處理。雖然可以接收由 CloudWatch 警報觸發的通知，但它不直接用於發送通知，因此此選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon SQS is a message queue service, mainly used for decoupling and asynchronous processing of messages. While it is possible to receive notifications triggered by CloudWatch alarms, it is not used directly to send notifications, so this option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一種事件路由服務，用於捕獲事件並將其路由到目標服務。雖然它可以處理CloudWatch警報事件，但它不是專門設計用來發送通知的服務，所以這個選項是錯誤的。
D.en: Incorrect. is an event routing service that captures and routes events to target services. Although it can handle CloudWatch alarm events, it is not a service specifically designed to send notifications, so this option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon 簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon SNS 是一種通知傳送服務，可以透過電子郵件、簡訊等方式發送通知。它與 Amazon CloudWatch 整合良好，可以在觸發 CloudWatch 警報時發送通知。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon SNS is a notification delivery service that can send notifications via email, SMS, etc. It integrates well with Amazon CloudWatch and can send notifications when CloudWatch alarms are triggered. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 雲端從業者希望為其 AWS 工作負載使用高度可用且可擴展的 DNS 服務。哪種 AWS 服務可以滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A cloud practitioner wants to use a highly available and scalable DNS service for its AWS workload. Which AWS service will meet this requirement?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 53 號公路
A.en: Amazon Route 53

B.zh: 亞馬遜 Lightsail
B.en: Amazon Lightsail

C.zh: AWS Amplify 託管
C.en: AWS Amplify Hosting

D.zh: 亞馬遜 S3
D.en: Amazon S3

A.zh: 正確。Amazon Route 53 是 AWS 提供的一項高度可用且可擴展的 DNS 服務，專門用於管理網域名稱解析並將流量路由到不同的資源。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a highly available and scalable DNS service provided by AWS, specifically designed to manage domain name resolution and route traffic to different resources.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Lightsail 是一種簡化的雲端運算服務，主要用於託管簡單的應用程式和網站，但它不是專用的 DNS 服務。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Lightsail is a simplified cloud computing service primarily used for hosting simple applications and websites, but it is not a dedicated DNS service.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Amplify Hosting 是一項針對前端和全端應用程式的託管服務，主要用於部署和託管 Web 應用程式而不是 DNS 服務。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Amplify Hosting is a hosting service for front-end and full-stack applications designed primarily for deploying and hosting web applications rather than DNS services.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 是用於儲存和檢索資料的物件儲存服務，但它與 DNS 服務無關。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is an object storage service used to store and retrieve data, but it has nothing to do with the DNS service.

answer_text.zh: A. 亞馬遜 53 號公路

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Route 53 是 AWS 提供的一項高度可用且可擴展的 DNS 服務，專門用於管理網域名稱解析並將流量路由到不同的資源。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Route 53 is a highly available and scalable DNS service provided by AWS, specifically designed to manage domain name resolution and route traffic to different resources.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 根據AWS責任共擔模型，哪一項任務是客戶的責任？
question_text.en: According to the AWS shared responsibility model, which task is the customer's responsibility?

A.zh: 維護運作 AWS Lambda 所需的基礎設施
A.en: Maintaining the infrastructure needed to run AWS Lambda

B.zh: 更新 Amazon DynamoDB 執行個體的作業系統
B.en: Updating the operating system of Amazon DynamoDB instances

C.zh: 維護 Amazon S3 基礎設施
C.en: Maintaining Amazon S3 infrastructure

D.zh: 更新 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的來賓作業系統
D.en: Updating the guest operating system on Amazon EC2 instances

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Lambda 是一項完全託管的服務，AWS 負責維護運作 Lambda 所需的基礎架構。客戶只需關閉程式碼和配置即可。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Lambda is a fully managed service, and AWS is responsible for maintaining the infrastructure required to run Lambda. Customers only need to close the code and configuration.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DynamoDB 是一項完全託管的服務，由 AWS 管理和更新其底層作業系統。無需客戶介入。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon DynamoDB is a fully managed service, with AWS managing and updating its underlying operating system. No customer intervention is required.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 是一項完全託管的儲存服務，AWS 維護其基礎架構。客戶只需管理儲存的內容和權限。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 is a fully managed storage service, and AWS maintains its infrastructure. Customers only need to manage stored content and permissions.

D.zh: 正確。在共擔責任模型下，客戶負責管理 EC2 執行個體的作業系統，包括更新和安全性修補程式。
D.en: Correct. Under the shared responsibility model, customers are responsible for managing the EC2 instance's operating system, including updates and security patches.

answer_text.zh: D. 更新 Amazon EC2 執行個體上的來賓作業系統
answer_text.en: D. Updating the guest operating system on Amazon EC2 instances

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：在共擔責任模型下，客戶負責管理 EC2 執行個體的作業系統，包括更新和安全性修補程式。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Under the shared responsibility model, customers are responsible for managing the EC2 instance's operating system, including updates and security patches.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在了解其與 Amazon EC2 執行個體管理相關的職責。根據 AWS 責任共擔模型，EC2 執行個體的哪些任務是公司的責任？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A company is learning about its responsibilities that are related to the management of Amazon EC2 instances. Which tasks for EC2 instances are the company’s responsibility, according to the AWS shared responsibility model? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 安裝並修補機器管理程式。
A.en: Install and patch the machine hypervisor.

B.zh: 修補來賓作業系統。
B.en: Patch the guest operating system.

C.zh: 加密關聯儲存上的靜態資料。
C.en: Encrypt data at rest on associated storage.

D.zh: 安裝實體硬體和佈線。
D.en: Install the physical hardware and cabling.

E.zh: 為 EC2 執行個體提供實體安全。
E.en: Provide physical security for the EC2 instances.

A.zh: 錯誤。根據AWS責任共擔模型，AWS負責管理底層基礎設施，包括虛擬機器管理程式的安裝和修補。客戶不負責杯子任務。
A.en: Incorrect. According to the AWS shared responsibility model, AWS is responsible for managing the underlying infrastructure, including the installation and patching of the hypervisor. The customer is not responsible for cup tasks.

B.zh: 正確。客戶負責管理和維護其 EC2 執行個體上的作業系統，包括安裝修補程式和更新。
B.en: Correct. Customers are responsible for managing and maintaining the operating system on their EC2 instances, including installing patches and updates.

C.zh: 正確。客戶有責任保護其數據，包括加密靜態資料。這是共享責任模型中客戶角色的一部分。
C.en: Correct. Customers are responsible for protecting their data, including encrypting data at rest. This is part of the client's role in the shared responsibility model.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS 管理和維護資料中心的硬體和佈線，因此客戶無需負責。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS manages and maintains the data center's hardware and cabling, so customers don't need to be responsible.

E.zh: 錯誤。AWS負責資料中心的管理安全，包括存取控制、監控等措施，客戶無需負責這些任務。
E.en: Incorrect. AWS is responsible for the management security of the data center, including access control, monitoring and other measures, and customers do not need to be responsible for these tasks.

answer_text.zh: B. 修補來賓作業系統。；C. 加密關聯儲存上的靜態資料。
answer_text.en: B. Patch the guest operating system.; C. Encrypt data at rest on associated storage.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BC (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：客戶負責管理和維護其 EC2 執行個體上的作業系統，包括安裝修補程式和更新。；客戶有責任保護其數據，包括加密靜態資料。這是共享責任模型中客戶角色的一部分。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Customers are responsible for managing and maintaining the operating system on their EC2 instances, including installing patches and updates.; Customers are responsible for protecting their data, including encrypting data at rest. This is part of the client's role in the shared responsibility model.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在本地資料中心的自我管理伺服器上執行 MySQL 資料庫工作負載。該公司希望將資料庫工作負載遷移到 AWS 託管服務。公司應該使用哪種遷移策略？
question_text.en: A company runs MySQL database workloads on self-managed servers in an on-premises data center. The company wants to migrate the database workloads to an AWS managed service. Which migration strategy should the company use?

A.zh: 重新主持
A.en: Rehost

B.zh: 回購
B.en: Repurchase

C.zh: 重構
C.en: Refactor

D.zh: 平臺重構
D.en: Replatform

A.zh: 錯誤。是一種「替代遷移」的方法，通常涉及將現有工作負載從本地遷移到雲端，而不對應用程式進行任何修改。對於資料庫工作負載，Rehost 可能涉及將資料庫遷移到 EC2 實例，但這不是「完全託管服務」，因此不符合問題要求。
A.en: Incorrect. is a method of "replacement migration", which usually involves migrating existing workloads from local to the cloud without any modification to the application program. For database workloads, Rehost may involve migrating the database to an EC2 instance, but this is not a "fully managed service" and therefore does not meet the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。是指購買新軟體或服務來取代現有解決方案，例如從自託管資料庫遷移到第三方 SaaS 解決方案。問題沒有提到需要購買新軟體，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Incorrect. refers to the purchase of new software or services to replace an existing solution, such as migrating from a self-hosted database to a third-party SaaS solution. The question does not mention the need to purchase new software, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。是對應用程式的重大修改，以利用雲端的本機功能。雖然重構可以優化資料庫效能，但題目中並沒有提到需要重構資料庫，所以這個選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. is a significant modification to an application to take advantage of the native capabilities of the cloud. Although reconstruction can optimize database performance, the question does not mention the need to reconstruct the database, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。是指對應用程式進行輕微修改以轉移到雲端託管服務。將 MySQL 資料庫移轉到 AWS 託管服務（例如 Amazon RDS for MySQL）是典型的 Replatform 策略，因此此選項也是如此。
D.en: Correct. refers to the slight modification of the application program to move to a cloud hosting service. Migrating a MySQL database to an AWS managed service such as Amazon RDS for MySQL is a typical Replatform strategy, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (80%)； B (20%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是指對應用程式進行輕微修改以轉移到雲端託管服務。將 MySQL 資料庫移轉到 AWS 託管服務（例如 Amazon RDS for MySQL）是典型的 Replatform 策略，因此此選項也是如此。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (80%); B (20%). Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to the slight modification of the application program to move to a cloud hosting service. Migrating a MySQL database to an AWS managed service such as Amazon RDS for MySQL is a typical Replatform strategy, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃將單體應用程式遷移到 AWS。該公司希望透過將應用程式拆分為微服務來實現應用程式的現代化。該公司將在 AWS 上部署微服務。公司應該使用哪種遷移策略？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate a monolithic application to AWS. The company wants to modernize the application by splitting it into microservices. The company will deploy the microservices on AWS. Which migration strategy should the company use?

A.zh: 重新主持
A.en: Rehost

B.zh: 回購
B.en: Repurchase

C.zh: 平臺重構
C.en: Replatform

D.zh: 重構
D.en: Refactor

A.zh: 錯誤。是「原樣遷移」，即現有應用程式直接遷移到雲端，無需對應用程式進行任何修改。這種方式適合快速遷移，但不適合需要現代化的場景。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
A.en: Incorrect. is "migration as is", that is, existing applications are directly migrated to the cloud without any modification to the application. This approach is suitable for quick migrations, but is not suitable for scenarios that require modernization. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。是指購買新的 SaaS 解決方案來取代現有應用程式。這種方法通常用於替換現有應用程序，而不是對其進行現代化改造。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
B.en: Incorrect. refers to the purchase of a new SaaS solution to replace an existing application. This approach is typically used to replace existing applications rather than modernize them. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。是指對應用程式進行輕微修改以適應雲端環境，但不對應用程式架構進行較大更改。雖然它比Rehost更靈活，但它不適合單一應用程式分割為微服務的場景。因此這個選項是錯誤的。
C.en: Incorrect. refers to making slight modifications to the application to adapt to the cloud environment, but does not make major changes to the application architecture. Although it is more flexible than Rehost, it is not suitable for scenarios where a single application is split into microservices. Therefore this option is wrong.

D.zh: 正確。指的是應用程式的重大架構轉變，例如將單一應用程式拆分為微服務。這種方法最適合問題中所說的「現代化」和「微服務部署」需求。因此這個選項是。
D.en: Correct. refers to a major architectural transformation of an application, such as splitting a single application into microservices. This method is most suitable for the "modernization" and "microservice deployment" requirements stated in the question. Therefore this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：指的是應用程式的重大架構轉變，例如將單一應用程式拆分為微服務。這種方法最適合問題中所說的「現代化」和「微服務部署」需求。因此這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: refers to a major architectural transformation of an application, such as splitting a single application into microservices. This method is most suitable for the "modernization" and "microservice deployment" requirements stated in the question. Therefore this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 4：計費、定價與支援 (Billing, Pricing, and Support)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望按部門和專案對其雲端成本進行詳細追蹤。公司應該使用哪些 AWS 功能或服務？
question_text.en: A company wants to implement detailed tracking of its cloud costs by department and project. Which AWS feature or service should the company use?

A.zh: 合併帳單
A.en: Consolidated billing

B.zh: 成本分配標籤
B.en: Cost allocation tags

C.zh: AWS Marketplace
C.en: AWS Marketplace

D.zh: AWS 預算
D.en: AWS Budgets

A.zh: 錯誤。合併計費用於將多個帳戶的帳單合併到一個帳戶中，方便集中管理，但不提供詳細的費用追蹤功能。
A.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Consolidated billing is used to consolidate bills from multiple accounts into one account to facilitate centralized management, but it does not provide detailed cost tracking functionality.

B.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：成本分配標籤是 AWS 提供的一項功能，可透過為資源分配標籤來實現詳細的成本追蹤。可依部門、項目等維度進行標籤分類，以實現成本精準分配。
B.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Cost allocation tags is a feature provided by AWS that enables detailed cost tracking by assigning tags to resources. Tags can be classified by departments, projects and other dimensions to achieve precise cost allocation.

C.zh: 錯誤。此選項所述內容：AWS Marketplace 是一個用於購買第三方軟體和服務的線上商店，與成本追蹤無關。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Marketplace is an online store for purchasing third-party software and services that has nothing to do with cost tracking.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Budgets 用於設定預算和監控成本，但它不支援詳細的成本分配和追蹤。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Budgets is used for setting budgets and monitoring costs, but it does not enable detailed cost allocation and tracking.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：成本分配標籤是 AWS 提供的一項功能，可透過為資源分配標籤來實現詳細的成本追蹤。可依部門、項目等維度進行標籤分類，以實現成本精準分配。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Cost allocation tags is a feature provided by AWS that enables detailed cost tracking by assigning tags to resources. Tags can be classified by departments, projects and other dimensions to achieve precise cost allocation.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 當 Amazon EC2 執行個體進入「停止」狀態時，使用者想要呼叫 AWS Lambda 函數。哪種 AWS 服務適合此用例？
question_text.en: A user wants to invoke an AWS Lambda function when an Amazon EC2 instance enters the “stopping” state. Which AWS service is appropriate for this use case?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 EventBridge
A.en: Amazon EventBridge

B.zh: AWS 配置
B.en: AWS Config

C.zh: Amazon 簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

D.zh: AWS CloudFormation
D.en: AWS CloudFormation

A.zh: 正確。Amazon EventBridge 是一項事件匯流排服務，可擷取 AWS 資源的狀態變更事件（例如 EC2 執行個體進入「停止」狀態）並觸發後續操作（例如呼叫 Lambda 函數）。這是這個問題的正確答案。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon EventBridge is an event bus service that can capture status change events of AWS resources (such as an EC2 instance entering the "stopping" state) and trigger subsequent operations (such as calling a Lambda function). This is the correct answer to this question.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config 主要用於記錄資源配置的歷史變更和合規性檢查，而不是即時回應資源狀態變更事件。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Config is mainly used to record historical changes in resource configurations and compliance checks, rather than responding to resource status change events in real time.

C.zh: 錯誤。SNS 是一種訊息通知服務，可以向訂閱者傳送訊息，但無法直接擷取 EC2 執行個體狀態變更事件。
C.en: Incorrect. SNS is a message notification service that can send messages to subscribers, but it cannot directly capture EC2 instance status change events.

D.zh: 錯誤。CloudFormation 是一項基礎架構即程式碼服務，用於建立和管理 AWS 資源，但不用於監控資源狀態變更或觸發事件。
D.en: Incorrect. CloudFormation is an infrastructure-as-code service that is used to create and manage AWS resources, but it is not used to monitor resource status changes or trigger events.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon EventBridge 是一項事件匯流排服務，可擷取 AWS 資源的狀態變更事件（例如 EC2 執行個體進入「停止」狀態）並觸發後續操作（例如呼叫 Lambda 函數）。這是這個問題的正確答案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon EventBridge is an event bus service that can capture status change events of AWS resources (such as an EC2 instance entering the "stopping" state) and trigger subsequent operations (such as calling a Lambda function). This is the correct answer to this question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司內部有一個 MariaDB 資料庫。該公司希望將資料移至 AWS 雲端。哪項 AWS 服務將以最少的營運開銷託管此資料庫？
question_text.en: A company has a MariaDB database on premises. The company wants to move the data to the AWS Cloud. Which AWS service will host this database with the LEAST amount of operational overhead?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 RDS
A.en: Amazon RDS

B.zh: 亞馬遜海王星
B.en: Amazon Neptune

C.zh: 亞馬遜 S3
C.en: Amazon S3

D.zh: 亞馬遜 DynamoDB
D.en: Amazon DynamoDB

A.zh: 正確。Amazon RDS 是由 MariaDB 提供支援的託管資料庫服務，可大幅減少資料庫管理和營運開銷。使用者無需管理底層硬體、作業系統或資料庫軟體，AWS會自動處理備份、修補和監控。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS is a managed database service powered by MariaDB that significantly reduces database management and operational overhead. Users do not need to manage the underlying hardware, operating system or database software, AWS automatically handles backup, patching and monitoring.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Neptune 是專門針對圖形資料庫的服務，不適用於 MariaDB 等託管關聯式資料庫。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon Neptune is a service specifically for graph databases and is not intended for hosted relational databases such as MariaDB.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 是一種對象儲存服務，適合儲存檔案和資料對象，但不適合託管關聯式資料庫。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon S3 is an object storage service that is suitable for storing files and data objects, but is not suitable for hosting relational databases.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon DynamoDB 是一種 NoSQL 資料庫服務，適用於鍵值對和文件存儲，不支援關聯式資料庫（例如 MariaDB）。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon DynamoDB is a NoSQL database service, suitable for key-value pairs and document storage, and does not support relational databases (such as MariaDB).

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon RDS 是由 MariaDB 提供支援的託管資料庫服務，可大幅減少資料庫管理和營運開銷。使用者無需管理底層硬體、作業系統或資料庫軟體，AWS會自動處理備份、修補和監控。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon RDS is a managed database service powered by MariaDB that significantly reduces database management and operational overhead. Users do not need to manage the underlying hardware, operating system or database software, AWS automatically handles backup, patching and monitoring.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 哪些 AWS 服務或功能支援 AWS 帳戶的治理、合規性和風險稽核？
question_text.en: Which AWS service or feature supports governance, compliance, and risk auditing of AWS accounts?

A.zh: 多重身份驗證 (MFA)
A.en: Multi-factor authentication (MFA)

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: Amazon 簡單通知服務 (Amazon SNS)
C.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)

D.zh: AWS CloudTrail
D.en: AWS CloudTrail

A.zh: 錯誤。MFA 是一項安全功能，用於增強使用者帳戶的保護，但它與治理、合規性和風險審計沒有直接關係，因此此選項是。
A.en: Incorrect. MFA is a security feature used to enhance the protection of user accounts, but it is not directly related to governance, compliance and risk auditing, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。是一種用於運行程式碼的無伺服器運算服務，但它不涉及治理、合規性或風險審計功能，因此此選項是。
B.en: Incorrect. is a serverless computing service used to run code, but it does not involve governance, compliance, or risk auditing capabilities, so this option is.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon SNS 是用於發送通知的訊息服務，但它不支援治理、合規性或風險審核功能，因此此選項是。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon SNS is a messaging service used to send notifications, but it does not support governance, compliance, or risk auditing capabilities, so this option is.

D.zh: 正確。是一項記錄和追蹤使用者活動和 API 呼叫的服務，支援治理、合規性和風險審計，因此此選項是。
D.en: Correct. is a service that records and tracks user activity and API calls, supporting governance, compliance, and risk auditing, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項記錄和追蹤使用者活動和 API 呼叫的服務，支援治理、合規性和風險審計，因此此選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a service that records and tracks user activity and API calls, supporting governance, compliance, and risk auditing, so this option is.

questions.domain: 領域 2：安全與合規 (Security and Compliance)

question_text.zh: 公司實施 AWS CloudTrail 時使用哪一種 AWS 雲端設計原則？
question_text.en: Which AWS Cloud design principle is a company using when the company implements AWS CloudTrail?

A.zh: 啟動可追溯性。
A.en: Activate traceability.

B.zh: 使用無伺服器運算架構。
B.en: Use serverless compute architectures.

C.zh: 依照程式​​碼執行操作。
C.en: Perform operations as code.

D.zh: 只需幾分鐘即可走向全球。
D.en: Go global in minutes.

A.zh: 正確。AWS CloudTrail的主要功能是記錄使用者和服務作業日誌並提供稽核和追溯功能。這完全符合「啟動可追溯性」的設計原則。
A.en: Correct. The main function of AWS CloudTrail is to record user and service operation logs and provide auditing and traceability functions. This aligns perfectly with the “Activate Traceability” design principle.

B.zh: 錯誤。Serverless運算架構（例如AWS Lambda）是關於如何設計應用程式的運算資源，而CloudTrail是一種日誌服務，與Serverless架構沒有直接關係。
B.en: Incorrect. Serverless computing architecture (such as AWS Lambda) is about how to design the computing resources of the application, while CloudTrail is a logging service and not directly related to serverless architecture.

C.zh: 錯誤。「將操作作為程式碼執行」是指使用程式碼來自動化操作和管理資源（例如透過AWS CloudFormation），而CloudTrail用於記錄操作日誌，不涉及程式碼執行。
C.en: Incorrect. "Execute operations as code" refers to using code to automate operations and manage resources (such as through AWS CloudFormation), while CloudTrail is used to record operation logs and does not involve code execution.

D.zh: 錯誤。「分鐘全球化」是指AWS的全球基礎設施支援快速擴展到多個區域，而CloudTrail的功能與全球化沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect. "Globalization in minutes" means that AWS's global infrastructure supports rapid expansion to multiple regions, while CloudTrail's functions are not directly related to globalization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS CloudTrail的主要功能是記錄使用者和服務作業日誌並提供稽核和追溯功能。這完全符合「啟動可追溯性」的設計原則。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: The main function of AWS CloudTrail is to record user and service operation logs and provide auditing and traceability functions. This aligns perfectly with the “Activate Traceability” design principle.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 本公司需要威脅偵測服務來持續監控其 AWS 帳戶、工作負載和 Amazon S3 儲存桶是否有惡意活動和未經授權的行為。哪種 AWS 服務符合這些要求？
question_text.en: A company needs a threat detection service that will continuously monitor its AWS accounts, workloads, and Amazon S3 buckets for malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. Which AWS service meets these requirements?

A.zh: AWS 盾
A.en: AWS Shield

B.zh: AWS 防火牆管理器
B.en: AWS Firewall Manager

C.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: 亞馬遜檢查員
D.en: Amazon Inspector

A.zh: 錯誤。是一項旨在保護應用程式免受分散式阻斷服務 (DDoS) 攻擊的服務。它不會為 AWS 帳戶、工作負載或 S3 儲存桶提供全面的威脅偵測，因此此選項可以。
A.en: Incorrect. is a service designed to protect applications from distributed denial of service (DDoS) attacks. It does not provide comprehensive threat detection for AWS accounts, workloads, or S3 buckets, so this option is.

B.zh: 錯誤。是集中管理防火牆規則的服務，主要用於管理和部署規則以保護資源。它沒有持續監控威脅的能力，所以這個選項是。
B.en: Incorrect. is a service that centrally manages firewall rules and is mainly used to manage and deploy rules to protect resources. It does not have the capability to continuously monitor threats, so this option is.

C.zh: 正確。是一項威脅偵測服務，可永續監控 AWS 帳戶、工作負載和 S3 儲存桶，以偵測惡意活動和未經授權的行為。這個選項是。
C.en: Correct. is a threat detection service that continuously monitors AWS accounts, workloads, and S3 buckets to detect malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. This option is.

D.zh: 錯誤。是一項自動化安全評估服務，主要用於檢查應用程式安全漏洞和合規問題。它不適合持續性威脅偵測，所以這個選項是。
D.en: Incorrect. is an automated security assessment service mainly used to check application security vulnerabilities and compliance issues. It is not suitable for persistent threat detection, so this option is.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一項威脅偵測服務，可永續監控 AWS 帳戶、工作負載和 S3 儲存桶，以偵測惡意活動和未經授權的行為。這個選項是。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a threat detection service that continuously monitors AWS accounts, workloads, and S3 buckets to detect malicious activity and unauthorized behavior. This option is.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正計劃遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司正在進行組織轉型，希望能夠更積極地回應客戶的詢問和回饋。根據 AWS 雲端採用框架 (AWS CAF)，公司應該執行哪些任務來滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is planning to migrate to the AWS Cloud. The company is conducting organizational transformation and wants to become more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback. Which task should the company perform to meet these requirements, according to the AWS Cloud Adoption Framework (AWS CAF)?

A.zh: 重新調整團隊以專注於產品和價值流。
A.en: Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.

B.zh: 透過新產品和服務創造新的價值主張。
B.en: Create new value propositions with new products and services.

C.zh: 使用新的數據和分析平臺來創建可行的見解。
C.en: Use a new data and analytics platform to create actionable insights.

D.zh: 遷移遺留基礎架構並使其現代化。
D.en: Migrate and modernize legacy infrastructure.

A.zh: 正確。根據AWS CAF的說法，組織轉型的核心是透過團隊重組，聚焦產品和價值流，提高回應顧客需求的能力。這直接符合「更積極回應客戶的詢問和回饋」的要求。
A.en: Correct. According to AWS CAF, the core of organizational transformation is to improve the ability to respond to customer needs through the realignment of teams to focus on products and value streams. This directly aligns with the requirement in the question of “becoming more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback.”.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然創造新的價值主張可以幫助公司吸引客戶，但這並不是提高回應客戶詢問和回饋的能力的直接任務。
B.en: Incorrect. While creating new value propositions can help companies attract customers, it is not a direct task of improving the ability to respond to customer inquiries and feedback.

C.zh: 錯誤。數據和分析平臺的使用可以幫助企業獲得洞察，但這與組織轉型和團隊調整無關，直接解決問題的需求。
C.en: Incorrect. The use of data and analytics platforms can help companies gain insights, but this has nothing to do with organizational transformation and team adjustment, and directly solves the needs of the problem.

D.zh: 錯誤。遷移和現代化遺留基礎設施是一項技術領域任務，與組織轉型和提高客戶回應能力沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect. Migrating and modernizing legacy infrastructure is a technology domain task that is not directly related to organizational transformation and improving customer responsiveness.

answer_text.zh: A. 重新調整團隊以專注於產品和價值流。
answer_text.en: A. Realign teams to focus on products and value streams.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：根據AWS CAF的說法，組織轉型的核心是透過團隊重組，聚焦產品和價值流，提高回應顧客需求的能力。這直接符合「更積極回應客戶的詢問和回饋」的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: According to AWS CAF, the core of organizational transformation is to improve the ability to respond to customer needs through the realignment of teams to focus on products and value streams. This directly aligns with the requirement in the question of “becoming more responsive to customer inquiries and feedback.”.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要調整其 Amazon EC2 執行個體的規模。哪種配置變更能夠以最少的營運開銷滿足此要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to rightsize its Amazon EC2 instances. Which configuration change will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在另一個可用區中新增 EC2 執行個體。
A.en: Add EC2 instances in another Availability Zone.

B.zh: 根據使用率變更 EC2 執行個體的大小和類型。
B.en: Change the size and type of the EC2 instances based on utilization.

C.zh: 將付款方式從按需付款方式轉換為儲蓄計劃。
C.en: Convert the payment method from On-Demand to Savings Plans.

D.zh: 使用更大的執行個體類型重新配置 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Reprovision the EC2 instances with a larger instance type.

A.zh: 錯誤。在另一個可用區中新增實例並不能解決「調整大小」問題。 Rightsize的目標是優化現有資源，而不是增加資源。
A.en: Incorrect. Adding instances in another Availability Zone does not resolve the "rightsizing" issue. The goal of Rightsize is to optimize existing resources, not to increase resources.

B.zh: 正確。根據使用情況調整實例大小和變更實例類型是調整大小的核心面向。這種方法可確保資源滿足實際需求，同時減少營運開銷。
B.en: Correct. Resizing and changing instance types based on usage is a core aspect of rightsizing. This approach ensures that resources match actual needs while reducing operational overhead.

C.zh: 錯誤。規模是關於資源最佳化，而不是成本優化。
C.en: Incorrect. size is about resource optimization, not cost optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。直接使用較大的實例類型可能會導致資源過度分配，這與調整規模的目標背道而馳。
D.en: Incorrect. Using a larger instance type directly may lead to over-allocation of resources, contrary to the goals of rightsizing.

answer_text.zh: B. 根據使用率變更 EC2 執行個體的大小和類型。
answer_text.en: B. Change the size and type of the EC2 instances based on utilization.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：根據使用情況調整實例大小和變更實例類型是調整大小的核心面向。這種方法可確保資源滿足實際需求，同時減少營運開銷。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Resizing and changing instance types based on usage is a core aspect of rightsizing. This approach ensures that resources match actual needs while reducing operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 3：雲端技術與服務 (Cloud Technology and Services)

question_text.zh: 哪種 AWS 服務支援使用者註冊功能以及對行動和 Web 應用程式的驗證？
question_text.en: Which AWS service supports user sign-up functionality and authentication to mobile and web applications?

A.zh: 亞馬遜 Cognito
A.en: Amazon Cognito

B.zh: AWS 配置
B.en: AWS Config

C.zh: 亞馬遜 GuardDuty
C.en: Amazon GuardDuty

D.zh: AWS 系統管理器
D.en: AWS Systems Manager

A.zh: 正確。Amazon Cognito 是一項專門為支援行動和 Web 應用程式的使用者註冊、登入和身分驗證而設計的服務。
A.en: Correct. This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is a service specifically designed to support user registration, login, and authentication for mobile and web applications.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Config 是一項用於資源配置管理和合規性檢查的服務，獨立於使用者驗證。
B.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Config is a service for resource configuration management and compliance checking, independent of user authentication.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon GuardDuty 是一種威脅偵測服務，用於保護 AWS 帳戶和工作負載，無論使用者註冊和驗證如何。
C.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: Amazon GuardDuty is a threat detection service used to secure AWS accounts and workloads regardless of user registration and authentication.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager 是一項用於管理和操作 AWS 資源的服務，獨立於使用者驗證。
D.en: Incorrect. This option is described as follows: AWS Systems Manager is a service for managing and operating AWS resources, independent of user authentication.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon Cognito 是一項專門為支援行動和 Web 應用程式的使用者註冊、登入和身分驗證而設計的服務。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: This option is described as follows: Amazon Cognito is a service specifically designed to support user registration, login, and authentication for mobile and web applications.

questions.domain: 領域 1：雲端概念 (Cloud Concepts)

question_text.zh: 由於所有 AWS 使用者的聚合使用量，AWS 雲端的哪些優點可以幫助公司降低使用成本？
question_text.en: Which benefit of the AWS Cloud helps companies achieve lower usage costs because of the aggregate usage of all AWS users?

A.zh: 無須猜測容量
A.en: No need to guess capacity

B.zh: 能夠在幾分鐘內走向全球
B.en: Ability to go global in minutes

C.zh: 規模經濟
C.en: Economies of scale

D.zh: 提高速度與敏捷性
D.en: Increased speed and agility

A.zh: 錯誤。cup選項描述了AWS的彈性，這意味著使用者不需要估計容量，可以根據實際需要動態調整資源。這與降低使用成本沒有直接關係。
A.en: Incorrect. The cup option describes the elasticity of AWS, which means that users do not need to estimate capacity and can dynamically adjust resources according to actual needs. This is not directly related to reducing usage costs.

B.zh: 錯誤。cup選項描述了AWS的全球優勢。用戶可以在全球範圍內快速部署應用程序，但這與降低使用成本沒有直接關係。
B.en: Incorrect. The cup option describes the global advantages of AWS. Users can quickly deploy applications globally, but this is not directly related to reducing usage costs.

C.zh: 正確。此選項所述內容：規模經濟是AWS雲的核心優勢之一。由於其龐大的用戶群和資源共享，AWS可以以較低的成本提供服務，從而幫助客戶降低使用成本。
C.en: Correct. Scale economy is one of the core advantages of the AWS cloud. Due to its large user base and resource sharing, AWS can provide services at a lower cost, thereby helping customers reduce usage costs.

D.zh: 錯誤。cup 選項描述了 AWS 的敏捷性優勢。使用者可以快速部署和調整資源，但這與降低使用成本沒有直接關係。
D.en: Incorrect. The cup option describes the agility advantage of AWS. Users can quickly deploy and adjust resources, but this is not directly related to reducing usage costs.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：此選項所述內容：規模經濟是AWS雲的核心優勢之一。由於其龐大的用戶群和資源共享，AWS可以以較低的成本提供服務，從而幫助客戶降低使用成本。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Scale economy is one of the core advantages of the AWS cloud. Due to its large user base and resource sharing, AWS can provide services at a lower cost, thereby helping customers reduce usage costs.
